## TDD checklist

> Per `CLAUDE.md`, every change requires a prior failing test. No exceptions.

- [ ] Tests written **before** implementation (RED phase confirmed — paste test output below)
- [ ] All new production code is covered by tests
- [ ] `npm run test` — all frontend tests green
- [ ] `cargo test` — all Rust tests green
- [ ] `npm run lint` — no ESLint / Prettier errors
- [ ] `cargo clippy` — zero warnings
